title: Charmed Life - Title Page (Fragment 1)
text:
Diana Wynne Jones

DIANA WYNNE JONES

THE CHRONICLES OF CHRESTOMANCI

C HARMED L IFE

vocabulary.definition: A person responsible for managing or directing an organization or activity.
vocabulary.example: He acted as the administrator of the magical realm.

vocabulary.definition: A person who writes books or other literary works.
vocabulary.example: Diana Wynne Jones is the author of the series.
The charmed life of the protagonist was anything but ordinary.

vocabulary.definition: A fictional title and character name in the works of Diana Wynne Jones, signifying a powerful enchanter and administrator of magic.
vocabulary.example: Chrestomanci is a key figure in the series.

vocabulary.definition: A factual written account of important or historical events in the order of their occurrence.
vocabulary.example: The chronicles of Chrestomanci detail many magical adventures.

vocabulary.definition: A person who uses magic spells or is believed to have magical powers.
vocabulary.example: The enchanter cast a powerful spell.

vocabulary.definition: A genre of speculative fiction involving magic and supernatural elements.
vocabulary.example: Her writing is often classified as fantasy.
Chrestomanci is a fictional character created by the author.

vocabulary.definition: The existence of an individual human being or animal.
vocabulary.example: He lived a long and happy life.

vocabulary.definition: Relating to, using, or resembling magic.
vocabulary.example: They lived in a magical world.

vocabulary.definition: A set of related works, published or broadcast in succession.
vocabulary.example: The Chronicles of Chrestomanci is a series of fantasy novels.

vocabulary.definition: The name of a book, composition, or other artistic work.
vocabulary.example: The book's title page displayed the author's name prominently.
